notes: Moved the Creation Wizard out of the embedded Home flow and into a dedicated Pathmark Online wizard workspace within the same browser tab.
Added dashboard entry, draft restore, and Settings restore actions that open the dedicated wizard workspace.
Added a Return to dashboard action and returned users to the dashboard after saving, keeping, or discarding a wizard draft.
Added client-side required-text detection so the Next arrow can become available as soon as required text fields are non-empty, reducing reliance on Ctrl+Enter for text areas.
Retained collapsed guidance panels, helper checklist routing, explicit finish dates/times, and silent automatic Google Tasks checklist rows from v0.6.15.
release_notes: Moves the Pathmark creation wizard into its own immersive Pathmark Online workspace, keeps the dashboard as the entry point, and improves required text question navigation so the Next arrow can activate as soon as required text is entered rather than relying on Ctrl+Enter.
